entries.assessment: An initial contract-valid main-branch review artifact was generated for the trimmed archive review surface.
The review was corrected after identifying analytical overreach on contract coverage and is preserved locally with a tracker symlink.
corrections_applied: narrowed F1 from blocker-level defect to medium contract-coverage gap
kept F2 as the main blocking traceability issue
kept F3 as a medium reproducibility issue around MP3 termination
entries.final_judgment: The corrected review is contract-valid, locally preserved, and tracker-linked.

entries.assessment: The in-repo review object is now the evolving review history for submitted HEAD reviews, with each new review appended as a new entry rather than replacing the prior assessment.
storage_model: keep the evolving review object in-repo under review/
keep the concrete review artifact local
link the local artifact into the tracker surface when useful
